method_designs.design_rationale: The file exposes five predict_next_draw modes. method_designs.design_rationale: QuickMLPredictor.predict_advanced_ensemble is only a candidate legacy entrypoint; no canonical runtime entrypoint is approved. Its Method 9 terminal iteration always forms a two-row pattern and then reads pattern[2], so the pinned callable raises IndexError for every usable history length (at least five), including the proposed 50-row minimum. A direct crash-faithful wrapper is not a useful replay strategy, while correcting the loop boundary changes executable semantics and requires a separately identified strategy or explicit CTO approval.

method_designs.design_rationale: BigLottoAuditor.run_audit is an outcome-aware multi-period evaluator. It reads CSV in the constructor, silently substitutes synthetic random history on every exception, samples multiple random bets, observes the actual draw, and returns aggregate hit-rate/ROI rather than a ticket.
